allow: Bash(node -e "const{createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=createClient\({url:'file:openremit.db'}\);const t=await c.execute\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table'\\"\);for\(const row of t.rows\){const cols=await c.execute\('select * from '+row.name+' limit 0'\);console.log\('• '+row.name+': '+cols.columns.join\(', '\)\);}}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const{createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=createClient\({url:'file:openremit.db'}\);const r=await c.execute\('select name from sqlite_master where type=\\"table\\" and name=\\"memberships\\"'\);console.log\(r.rows.length?'memberships table created':'MISSING'\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const{createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=createClient\({url:'file:openremit.db'}\);const r=await c.execute\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table' and name='memberships'\\"\);console.log\(r.rows.length?'✅ memberships table created':'❌ MISSING'\);const cols=await c.execute\('select * from memberships limit 0'\);console.log\('columns:', cols.columns.join\(', '\)\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const{createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=createClient\({url:'file:openremit.db'}\);const r=await c.execute\(\\"select status, monthly_amount, interval, charges_made from memberships where user_id in \(select id from users where email='member1@example.com'\)\\"\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows[0],null,2\)\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const{createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=createClient\({url:'file:openremit.db'}\);const u=await c.execute\(\\"select id from users where email='member1@example.com'\\"\);if\(u.rows[0]\){const id=u.rows[0].id;await c.execute\({sql:'delete from memberships where user_id=?',args:[id]}\);await c.execute\({sql:'delete from transactions where user_id=?',args:[id]}\);await c.execute\({sql:'delete from users where id=?',args:[id]}\);}const cu=await c.execute\('select count\(*\) n from users'\);const cm=await c.execute\('select count\(*\) n from memberships'\);console.log\('users:',cu.rows[0].n,'memberships:',cm.rows[0].n\);}\)\(\)")
